name: Blackgaol Knight
description: Knight of the Solitary Gaol is an Enemy Boss in Elden Ring. The Knight of the Solitary Gaol switches weapons between a Greatsword and a Crossbow, and is found in the Western Nameless Mausoleum. The Knight of the Solitary Gaol drops the Greatsword of Solitude and his Solitude Set upon death. This is an optional boss as players don't need to defeat it to advance in Shadow of the Erdtree.

name: Chief Bloodfiend
description: Chief Bloodfiend is a Great Enemy Boss in Elden Ring. Chief Bloodfiend is a large boss that is armed with a club and is found in Rivermouth Cave. This is an optional boss as players don't need to defeat it to advance in Elden Ring.

name: Demi-Human Swordmaster Onze
description: Demi-Human Swordmaster Onze is a Great Enemy Boss in Elden Ring. Onze is a demi-human that, despite his appearance, skillfully wields a magic katana and is found at the bottom of the Belurat Gaol. This is an optional boss as players don't need to defeat it to advance in Shadow of the Erdtree.

name: Divine Beast Dancing Lion
description:
Divine beasts are messengers of the heavens, and their rage mirrors the tumult of the skies, of which storms are the pinnacle. 
   When the Impaler's army assailed the tower, the ritual of the lion dance was turned toward martial ends—its divinity, its fury, its light-footed beauty.

name: Ghostflame Dragon
description: Gravesite Plain:100,000 Dragon HeartSomber Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone

name: Lamenter
description: Lamenter is a Boss in Elden Ring. Lamenter is a small but sneaky boss that uses clones as its main attacking method and is found in Lamenter's Gaol. This is an optional boss as players don't need to defeat it to advance in Elden Ring.

name: Rellana Twin Moon Knight
description: 240,000Remembrance of the Twin Moon Knight

name: Red Bear
description: Red Bear is a Great Enemy Boss in Elden Ring. Red Bear is a humanoid boss who glows white and almost looks like wears a fur coat from a bear and is found in the Northern Nameless Mausoleum. This is an optional boss as players don't need to defeat it to advance in Shadow of the Erdtree.

name: Black Knight Edredd
description: Black Knight Edredd is a Field Boss in Elden Ring. Black Knight Edredd is a winged knight armed with a double-ended sword and is found in Fort of Reprimand. This is an optional boss as players don't need to defeat it to advance in Shadow of the Erdtree.

name: Black Knight Garrew
description: Black Knight Garrew is an Enemy Boss in Elden Ring. Black Knight Garrew is a big human knight that's equipped with a large mace and a large shield and is found in Fog Rift Fort. This is an optional boss as players don't need to defeat it to advance in Elden Ring.

name: Commander Gaius
description:
Riding atop the boar he called his other half, Gaius was in fact a warrior of albinauric extraction. 
 Both were as elder brothers to the lion, and both were cursed from birth. In spite of, or perhaps because of this very reason, Gaius was both Messmer's friend and the leader of his men.

name: Count Ymir Mother of Fingers
description: Truly, I desired... to be your mother...

name: Curseblade Labirith
description: Curseblades appear to dance when they spin their shimmering circular blades. These ascetics, who failed to become tutelary deities, were a scourge for those who attempted to invade the hornsent homeland.

name: Death Knight
description: Fog Rift Catacombs:110,000  RunesDeath Knight's Twin AxesCrimson Amber Medallion +3

name: Dryleaf Dane (Boss)
description: Dryleaf Dane is a Field Boss in Elden Ring. Dryleaf Dane is originally a friendly NPC, but can trigger a boss fight after acquiring the Monk's Missive note. He can be found in Moorth Ruins. This is an optional boss as players don't need to defeat it to advance in Shadow of the Erdtree.

name: Golden Hippopotamus
description: Shadow Keep:200,000Aspects of the Crucible: ThornsScadutree Fragment x2

name: Messmer the Impaler
description: Those stripped of the Grace of Gold shall all meet death. In the embrace of Messmer's flame.

name: Metyr Mother of Fingers
description: Metyr, Mother of Fingers is a Legend Boss in Elden Ring. Metyr, Mother of Fingers is a large monster that is composed of several fingers with two arms in front, and has a stomach made of smaller fingers, and is found in the Finger Ruins of Miyr. This is an optional boss as players don't need to defeat it to advance in Shadows of the Erdtree.

name: Rakshasa
description: Cut down and devour. Only those who repeat the cycle without rest can truly subvert the self and become Rakshasa.

name: Ralva the Great Red Bear
description: Ralva the Great Red Bear is a Field Boss in Elden Ring. Ralva the Great Red Bear is a ferocious boss that fights with the strength of its limbs and is found in Scadu Altus. This is an optional boss as players don't need to defeat it to advance in Shadow of the Erdtree.

name: Tree Sentinel
description: The living rampart of the Erdtree, the Tree Sentinels are the standard to which all defenders of the Erdtree aspire.
location:
Tree Sentinels can be found in: 
 Limgrave [More Info] [Map Link] 
 2x in Altus Plateau [More Info] [Map Link] 
 2x in Hinterland [More Info] [Map Link]

name: Romina Saint of the Bud
description: Romina, Saint of the Bud is a Legend Boss in Elden Ring. She appears humanoid, though her lower half has inexplicably transformed into a centipede with a scorpion's stinger. After her church was burned during Messmer's crusade, she discovered a twisted divine element and weaved it into the Scarlet Rot, wielding the bud she cradled as a deadly poleblade in combat. She can be found in the Church of the Bud, which you can access at the end of your exploration in the Ancient Ruins of Rauh. This is not an optional boss, as players need to defeat her to advance in Shadow of the Erdtree.

name: Rugalea the Great Red Bear
description: Rugalea the Great Red Bear is a Boss in Elden Ring. Rugalea the Great Red Bear is a large red bear found in Rauh Base. This is an optional boss as players don't need to defeat it to advance in Shadow of the Erdtree.

name: Dancer of Ranah
description: Dancer of Ranah is a Boss in Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree. Dancer of Ranah is an agile fighter with a unique attack style and is found in Southern Nameless Mausoleum in an island west from the Cerulean Coast. This is an optional boss as players don't need to defeat it to advance in Elden Ring.

name: Putrescent Knight
description:
All tainted flesh eventually becomes putrescence, and this clump of it imbibed St. Trina's nectar, which granted it eternal rest. 
 And so it was that putrescence became her knight.

name: Death Rite Bird
description: In the time when there was no Erdtree, death was burned in ghostflame. Deathbirds were the keepers of that fire.
location:
Death Rite Birds can be found in: 
 Academy Gate Town [More Info ↓] [Map Link] 
 Caelid [More Info ↓] [Map Link] 
 Mountaintops of the Giants [More Info ↓] [Map Link] 
 Apostate Derelict [More Info ↓] [Map Link] 
 Charo's Hidden Grave [More Info ↓] [Map Link]

name: Demi-Human Queen Marigga
description: Demi-Human Queen Marigga is a Field Boss in Elden Ring. Demi-Human Queen Marigga has the appearance of a humanoid jackal and carries a staff. This is an optional boss as players don't need to defeat it to advance in Shadow of the Erdtree.

name: Ancient Dragon-Man
description: Ancient Dragon-Man is a Boss in Elden Ring. Ancient Dragon-Man carries a katana and moves quickly in between attacks, and is found in Dragon's Pit, he drops the Dragon-Hunter's Great Katana once defeated. This is an optional boss as players will not need to defeat him to advance in Elden Ring.

name: Ancient Dragon Senessax
description: The ancient dragons who betrayed their lord to side with a tyrant were known for wielding branching red lightning.

name: Bayle The Dread
description: Bayle the Dread is a Legend Boss in Elden Ring. Bayle is the forefather of the drakes, a sworn enemy of the ancient dragons, and the target of Igon's vengeance. He is found at the summit of the Jagged Peak. This is an optional boss as players don't need to defeat it to advance in Shadow of the Erdtree.

name: Jagged Peak Drake
description: Jagged Peak Foothills:90,000Dragon HeartDragonscale Flesh

name: Jori Elder Inquisitor
description: Jori, Elder Inquisitor is a Boss in Elden Ring. Jori, Elder Inquisitor is a hornsent summoner who wields the Barbed Staff-Spear and is found as the boss of the Darklight Catacombs, guarding the entrance to the Abyssal Woods. This is an optional boss as players do not need to defeat it to advance in Shadow of the Erdtree.

name: Midra Lord of Frenzied Flame
description: Enough.... I have endured more than enough...I ask you forgive me, dearest Nanaya...

name: Fallingstar Beast
description: Sellia Crystal Tunnel:7,600Somberstone Miner's Bell Bearing (1)Smithing Stone (7) x5Somber Smithing Stone (6)Gravity Stone Chunk x4

name: Scadutree Avatar
description: The Scadutree is the shadow of the Erdtree. Born of dark notions that bear no sense of Order, that twist and bend its stock, rendering it brittle.

name: Leda and Allies Boss
description: Leda and Allies is an NPC battle in Elden Ring exclusive to the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Needle Knight Leda leads a band of Miquella's faithful to prevent you from stopping him from becoming a god. This is not an optional battle as players must defeat them to advance in Shadow of the Erdtree.

name: Promised Consort Radahn
description: Tarnished one. Aspiring Lord of the old order. If you have known sin, if you grieve for this world, then yield the path forward to us. To I, Miquella, and my promised consort, Radahn.
